display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nghttp2; source_facts.homepage is the official nghttp2 site.
docs_sources: Official nghttp2 site provides a dedicated /documentation/ section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an HTTP/2 C library; source_facts.executables lists nghttp2 command-line tools.
